creator: rallenh@hotmail.com
text:
This has been fixed in the 1.13.0 pre-release rc1. There is an unbound 1.13.0rc4 available.

https://github.com/NLnetLabs/unbound/issues/358

https://lists.nlnetlabs.nl/pipermail/unbound-users/2020-November/007095.html

fr: https://lists.nlnetlabs.nl/pipermail/unbound-users/2020-November/007055.html

"- Fix dnstap socket and the chroot not applied properly to the dnstap
  socket path."

The ports patch is trivial but I'll include it for your perusal.
